products.name: XQ-58A Valkyrie
products.descriptor: Stealthy collaborative combat aircraft (CCA) for long-range high-subsonic tactical missions

evidence.snippet: The Valkyrie is a Collaborative Combat Aircraft (CCA)/ Autonomous Collaborative Platform (ACP) designed to operate with Joint and Allied Forces. Flying since 2019, the Valkyrie continues to pioneer tactical unmanned aerial system (UAS) technology and collaborative manned-unmanned capability.
The Valkyrie is a proven system that is in production today and flying alongside and teamed with F-35s, F-22s, F-15EXs, and F-18s from the U.S. Air Force and the U.S. Marine Corps.

products.name: BQM-177
products.descriptor: High-subsonic sea-skimming subscale aerial target for U.S. Navy live-fire training

evidence.snippet:
BQM-177
=======
With advanced aerodynamic design, the BQM-177 is a formidable high-performance target for live-fire training scenarios, including sub-sonic, sea-skimming anti-ship cruise missile threat emulation.

### Readiness
Featuring cutting-edge aerodynamic design, the BQM-177 serves as a powerful high-performance target for live-fire training, simulating sub-sonic, sea-skimming anti-ship missile threats. The BQM-177 is the U.S. Navy’s next-generation Subsonic Aerial Target (SSAT).

products.name: BQM-167
products.descriptor: High-subsonic subscale aerial target drone for USAF weapons-release training

evidence.snippet:
BQM-167
=======
The versatile design of the BQM-167 supports various mission requirements by accepting a wide array of internal and external payloads, including radar cross-section (RCS) augmentation, infrared (IR) augmentation, towed targets, and other special payloads and mission systems.

### Readiness
The BQM-167 Air Force Subscale Aerial Target (AFSAT) is the primary aerial target used by the U.S. Air Force, performing almost 100 percent of their subscale missions, providing realistic end-to-end weapons-release training for aviators and international customers.
![BQM 167 Image](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==)

products.name: Tactical Firejet
products.descriptor: Compact jet-powered tactical UAS for high-speed payload delivery in contested environments

evidence.snippet:
Tactical Firejet
================
Kratos’ Tactical Firejet is designed to affordably meet requirements for fast ingress and egress of tactically denied battle spaces with the ability to deliver significant payloads over long ranges at high speed.

### Readiness
The Firejet is in production today and has been proven over the last ten years. Simple integration of mission systems and weapons provides a high-speed, maneuverable, and low-visibility solution for operations in contested environments.

products.name: UTAP-22 Mako
products.descriptor: High-speed runway-independent uncrewed tactical aircraft with open mission-system architecture

evidence.snippet:
UTAP-22 Mako
============
The Kratos Mako is a high-speed, highly maneuverable unmanned aerial system (UAS) with open mission-system flexibility and ample payload capacity to make it an affordable and highly effective solution.

### Readiness
With its open mission system architecture and proven ability to integrate multiple payload options, the Mako is ready now to support single-ship, multi-ship, or manned-unmanned teaming operations.

products.name: MQM-178 Firejet
products.descriptor: Compact pneumatically-launched subscale aerial target for surface-to-air and air-to-air training

evidence.snippet:
MQM-178 Firejet
===============
The MQM-178 Firejet fills a variety of end-to-end weapons-release training roles, including surface-to-air and air-to-air. The Firejet delivers a high degree of versatility by providing the opportunity to test multiple weapon systems with one flexible and affordable aerial target system.

### Design
The MQM-178 aerial target features a carbon-fiber composite construction with advanced manufacturing techniques. Its compact, modular design supports a variety of custom payloads.

products.name: Full-Scale Aerial Target (FSAT)
products.descriptor: Remotely operated reusable full-scale aerial target replicating threat-representative fighter aircraft

evidence.snippet:
Full-Scale Aerial Target
========================
Designed to ensure operational readiness, Kratos’ Full-Scale Aerial Target (FSAT) is remotely operated, reusable, and designed to mimic threat-representative fighter aircraft for air-to-air pilot training and missile development.

### Proven Performance, Evolving Capability
For more than two decades, Kratos has been building targets that fulfill a variety of live fire testing and training scenarios. Our targets integrate scalable subsystems and optional payloads to deliver new capabilities or replacement technology without changing all components in the entire system.

products.name: Aethon II Tethered Drone System
products.descriptor: Persistent tethered UAS platform for ISR, SIGINT, C5 comms, and EW at up to 490 ft altitude

evidence.snippet:
Aethon Tethered Drone System
============================
Kratos’ tethered unmanned aerial systems—resilient solutions for demanding environments—offer persistent intelligence with command, control, computers, communications, and cyber (C5) mesh radio; signals intelligence (SIGINT); intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR); elevated sensor; and radar capabilities.

The Aethon II tethered unmanned aerial system epitomizes Kratos’ transformative innovation. Engineered for user-centered flexibility and high endurance, Aethon II integrates across surveillance, communications, and electronic warfare. Its modular, intuitive design ensures rapid reconfiguration and adaptability to mission-critical demands. Advanced technology is made elegantly accessible, cutting through traditional complexities and providing a reliable platform for evolving operational needs.

products.name: TDI-J45
products.descriptor: Compact expendable turbojet engine, 30 lbf thrust, for UAS and tactical missiles

evidence.snippet:
The Spartan Line of Turbojet Engines
====================================
Technical Directions Inc. (TDI), a Kratos company, and the Spartan Line of turbojet engines provides unique capabilities for expendable turbojet engine applications, such as unmanned aerial systems and tactical missiles.

### **TDI-J45**
*   4.5” O.D., 9” length
*   Modular exhaust nozzles
*   Thrust up to 30 lbf Sea Level / Static (SLS)
*   Best-in-class thrust specific fuel consumption (TSFC) from state-of-the-art turbomachinery
*   Integral generator delivers up to 1.2 kW of continuous power

products.name: TDI-J50

products.name: Scoring System Suite (SSS)
products.descriptor: Turnkey weapon scoring system auto-computing miss distance and closest approach for live-fire range operations

evidence.snippet:
### Weapon Scoring Systems
The Kratos Scoring System Suite (SSS) is a turnkey solution that AutoScores miss distance, relative velocity, and closest approach time between target and projectile. SSS provides results in seconds to support testing of ballistic, cruise missiles, hypersonic vehicles, and aerial targets.
